selfcheck.question: ¿Por qué `field(default_factory=list)` y no `= []`?
selfcheck.chosen_text: Evita el default mutable compartido entre instancias
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: dataclass fields use default_factory for mutables to avoid the shared default bug across instances — same idea as def f(xs=[]).

selfcheck.question: RelationshipEvidence.signal_score representa…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Una señal/dato numérico, no un veredicto de fraude o familia
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: RelationshipEvidence.signal_score is a numeric signal/datum, not a legal kinship or fraud verdict (domain forbids auto family/fraud labels).

selfcheck.question: Un Protocol EntityStore sirve para…
selfcheck.chosen_text: Definir un puerto get/save implementable por fakes y adapters
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: Protocol EntityStore describes a get/save port implementable by fakes/adapters without forcing inheritance or a single DB.

selfcheck.question: Objeto inválido: ¿cuándo fallar?
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: invalid state fails at construction via __post_init__/validate — do not leave half-built objects for later.

selfcheck.question: Client hereda de Person…
selfcheck.chosen_text: A menudo es frágil; composición (Client tiene PersonInfo) suele bastar
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: composition-before-inheritance: Client has PersonInfo often beats fragile Client(Person); inheritance is not always best or mandatory.

selfcheck.question: ¿Qué no debe tener el dominio de familiaridad?
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic: domain tests assert absence of dangerous APIs is_fraud / is_related_family. to_dict, invariants, and unit tests are expected; auto is_fraud is not.

retrospection.note: Knowledge limited to sequential packets through active section.
